title: Home search
text: We take your brief, shortlist four or five homes that genuinely fit, and film each one so you can decide before you fly.

title: School placement
text: Which school has places in your child's year group — and which has a two-year list. We handle applications and the run to open days.

title: Lease negotiation
text: Leases here are negotiable, and often written in the landlord's favour. We negotiate in your name and read every clause before you sign.

title: Settling in
text: Power, water, fibre, gas and the first grocery run. We connect the utilities before your container clears customs.

title: Visas and work permits
text: Class D permits, dependant passes and the paperwork that follows. We work alongside your organisation's HR team.

title: Staff and security
text: Vetted house staff, drivers and guards, with references we have actually called. Advice on what is normal to pay.
